acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_craft_001] Pass if the revised confession at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:191 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197 no longer runs through all five siblings as a list, and if the close at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:411 expresses Nami's conclusion without a round-robin summary of each sibling's stance. Fail if either passage still reads like rostered family metadata.

[chapter_10_prose_001] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:187, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:201, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:289, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:307 no longer carry emphasis through repeated stacks such as "Not X. Not Y. The Z." or "Noun. Noun. Noun." Fail if three-or-more clipped narration beats without full sentence structure are still doing the work in those targeted lines.

[FBR-009] Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4236-4241 makes Iven's admission hit through observable family reaction and page-handling detail rather than 'That landed.' Fail if the line remains a reusable impact sentence.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised confession at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:191 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197 no longer runs through all five siblings as a list, and if the close at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:411 expresses Nami's conclusion without a round-robin summary of each sibling's stance. Fail if either passage still reads like rostered family metadata.
findings.problem: Two pivotal revelation beats flatten into synopsis-like taxonomy. Tovin's confession catalogs each sibling in style-bible shorthand ("Riva on a pole," "Daro hearing under-song," and so on), and the closing paragraph again sorts Jun into each sibling's interpretive lane. The effect is mechanically explanatory rather than fully dramatic, which blunts the rawness of the discovery and makes the chapter sound like its own character dossier at the moment it should stay messier and more lived.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:191 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:197, rewrite Tovin's account so she recalls one or two concrete remembered instances from that aftermath instead of sequentially naming every sibling trait; keep her diction rooted in work, damage, and what she physically saw. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:411, keep the close inside Nami's perception and Jun's ordinary physical reality rather than summarizing how Daro, Riva, Lale, and Iven each categorize him.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:187, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:201, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:289, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:307 no longer carry emphasis through repeated stacks such as "Not X. Not Y. The Z." or "Noun. Noun. Noun." Fail if three-or-more clipped narration beats without full sentence structure are still doing the work in those targeted lines.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on clipped noun/negation fragments as a chapter-wide emphasis device: "Not Jun's name. Not the thought... The fit," "Not me. Not the gate. Not the smoke," "Pattern. Bright line. Fate," and similar stacks. At this density the move stops reading as pressure-earned variation and starts reading as a prose tic. It also violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:187, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:201, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:289, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:307, rebuild the emphasis into complete syntactic units or far fewer, more selective fragments. Keep the close-third urgency and compression, but stop using stacked noun fragments and negation beats as the default intensifier across the chapter.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4236-4241 makes Iven's admission hit through observable family reaction and page-handling detail rather than 'That landed.' Fail if the line remains a reusable impact sentence.
findings.problem: Full-book style pattern: the standalone 'That landed' impact beat appears in 10 chapters. This chapter uses it at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4240 while the family is reading Jun back into the ledger. The moment is too central and too painful to settle for a recycled impact marker. REPLACE.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4236-4241 so Iven's admission registers through this chapter's evidentiary texture: what his hands do, how Lale handles the page, how the others adjust to hearing the truth. Let the ledger scene carry the blow instead of naming it generically.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
